## 🧑‍💼 About Me

> **Information Technology** student at **National Economics University (NEU)** passionate about data, economics, and financial markets.  
> Experienced in **SQL, Python, Power BI, and ETL** through hands-on projects in customer behavior analysis, conversion analytics, and marketing insights.  
> Seeking a **Data Analyst Internship** as a stepping stone toward a career in **consulting**.

- 🔭 Building end-to-end data pipelines & impactful dashboards  
- 🤖 Exploring Machine Learning for business problem-solving  
- 🎯 Actively seeking **Data Analyst Internship** opportunities  

<img src="https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/73097560/115834477-dbab4500-a447-11eb-908a-139a6edaec5c.gif" width="100%"/>
